title: Pixel's Batsuits
description: Become vengeance. Become the night. Become Batman.
body:
# Pixel's Batsuits
### Become vengeance. Become the night. Become Batman
#### Requires GekoLib and Fabric API

Okay, I have some explaining to do.

I decided to start over when porting this mod to 1.21.1, due to the ongoing issues with the Hellbat and Batman Beyond suits.

To honor the memory of Val Kilmer, his sonar suit from Batman Forever has been added. All the other suits outside of the live action suits have yet to be ported. I will update here when suits are done.

Featuring the suits from the live-action TV series and movies!

Including:
- Adam West
- Michael Keaton (Batman '89)
- NEW!!! Val Kilmer (Sonar)
- Christian Bale (The Dark Knight / The Dark Knight Rises)
- Ben Affleck (Batman v Superman)
- Robert Pattinson

**Please note that this is an Alpha Build, and crafting recipes have yet to be added.**

**Huge shoutout and special thanks to sillymeows on Discord for making the textures for the tech and high tech part items, they look fantastic!**

---

**I do not own Batman, the character, or anything related to him. This is a fan project.**  
**Batman created by Bob Kane with Bill Finger**  
**Batman and all related characters remain property of Warner Bros. Entertainment and DC.**
